message:
feat: Auto-open model picker when no model found + persist selection

- Add ZellConfig class to persist model path to ~/Library/Application Support/Zell/config.json
- Auto-open file picker dialog on first launch when no model is found
- Add clickable model name in toolbar that opens file picker to change models
- Show loading states when model is being loaded
- Improve server error handling for graceful recovery
- Add signal handler (SIGINT/SIGTERM) for graceful shutdown
- Fix request queue loop to properly remove failed requests
